messages.subject: [R-sig-genetics] Speciation Genomics course (5th-9th of December)
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,
 
there is 1 seat left on the Physalia Speciation Genomics course happening next week online!
 
Course website: [ https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/course37/ ]( https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/course37/ )

Carlo
